chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْغُدُوِّ إِلَى عَرَفَاتٍ وَ حُدُودِهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 163 – The morning departure to Arafaat and its boundaries

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/117)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/117)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِنَّا مُشَاةٌ فَكَيْفَ نَصْنَعُ قَالَ أَمَّا أَصْحَابُ الرِّحَالِ فَكَانُوا يُصَلُّونَ الْغَدَاةَ بِمِنًى وَ أَمَّا أَنْتُمْ فَامْضُوا حَتَّى تُصَلُّوا فِي الطَّرِيقِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from Al Nazar Bin Suweyd, from Yahya Bin Imran Al Halby, from Abdul Hameed Al Ta’iy who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘We are walkers, so what should we do?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘As for the owners of the rides, so they should be Praying the morning Prayer in Mina, and as for you, so go until you Pray in the road’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Husayn ibn Sa‘id form al-Nadr ibn Suwayd from Yahya ibn “Imran al-Halabiy from ‘ Abd al-Hamid al-Ta’iy who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ‘We walk on foot. What must we do?’ He (the Imam) said, ‘Those who have the means of transportation perform the morning Salat (prayer) in Mina’ but you can go on and perform your Salat (prayer) on the way.’”
